{{CargoClone
|name=Rockman
|rank=orange
|cabin=2
|id=125
|gene1={race} DEF +50
|gene2={race} CIV +50
|gene3=Earth DMG +30
|gene4=Per 60 Zombie Minions in battle:
> Troop Earth DMG +6
|gene5=Troop Earth DMG +0.9%
|gene6=Per 60 Zombie Minions in battle:
> Troop Earth DMG +10
|gene7=Troop Earth DMG +1.5%
|}}
